summary: The diff implements the majority of the requested features (REQ-13 through REQ-20) primarily using localStorage-based frontend logic rather than the Motoko backend. Most functional requirements are present in the UI layer. Key gaps include: the backend (main.mo) shows no new Motoko logic for any of the new features; the LockedChat admin view exposes message text fields in the data model; and the backend phone number privacy enforcement is absent since all logic lives client-side.

missing_requirements.requirement: All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file. Registration, OTP verification, and phone number storage should have backend enforcement.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo shows no new registration, OTP, or phone verification logic. All registration and OTP handling is implemented purely in frontend localStorage hooks. The constraint requires all Motoko logic in main.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store all profile fields in the backend (Motoko actor). All saved profile data must persist in the backend and be retrievable from it.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo has no new profile storage functions. All profile data is stored in browser localStorage only, not in the IC canister backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store photos in the backend. Admin can see all uploaded photos when reviewing candidate profiles.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo has no photo storage or retrieval functions added. Photos are stored in localStorage. The constraint requires backend storage via main.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend must expose a query that returns ranked match suggestions computed in Motoko with compatibility scoring.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo has no compatibility scoring logic or match suggestion queries. All scoring logic is implemented client-side in localStorage/useQueries hooks.

missing_requirements.requirement: Match creation must be persisted in the backend (Motoko actor).
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo has no like/reject or match persistence logic. All like/match data is in localStorage only.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store all transaction records with payment status in the backend. Admin payment monitoring dashboard must reflect backend-stored transactions.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo has no payment recording or transaction storage logic for the chat unlock feature. All payment data is localStorage-only.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin notification must not include message content only metadata. The LockedChat model must never store message text. Backend must have locked chat and admin notification logic.
missing_requirements.reason: The Message interface in localStorage.ts includes a text field and messages are stored with full content. Additionally backend/main.mo has no locked chat or admin notification logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend must enforce authorization before returning plain-text phone numbers. Phone numbers must never be returned in plain text from backend without payment authorization.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo has no phone number privacy enforcement. All phone reveal logic is client-side in localStorage. The UserProfile type stores plain-text phone numbers in localStorage accessible without any payment check at the data layer.

hallucinated_features.description: Stripe payment integration scaffolding (setStripeConfiguration, createCheckoutSession, getStripeSessionStatus) present in backend/main.mo
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states real UPI or payment gateway integration as a non-goal and only mock payments are requested. No Stripe integration was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Invite links and RSVP system (generateInviteCode, submitRSVP, getAllRSVPs, getInviteCodes) in backend/main.mo
hallucinated_features.reason: No invite link or RSVP functionality was requested in any of REQ-13 through REQ-20.

hallucinated_features.description: ServicesPage route added to the application router
hallucinated_features.reason: A dedicated /services route and ServicesPage component were added which was not part of the requirements REQ-13 through REQ-20.
